origin.rebirth: Zakariya Razi returns as a guardian of science, healing and elemental knowledge.

story.intro: The greatest healer and alchemist of Persia awakens when darkness spreads a mysterious disease across worlds.
story.mission: Protect life by combining ancient medicine with future technology.
story.enemy: The Dark Plague created by shadow forces.

powers.name: Elemental Alchemy
powers.description: Controls the hidden energy inside natural elements.

powers.name: Scientific Vision
powers.description: Understands the secrets of matter and energy.
